creator: kp@freebsd.org
text:
There's another update patch in 255650, where Reed states "I no longer use this software (as I no longer work on the software that used log4cplus).  Please feel free to remove me as any maintainer for it.
Thank you for the patch."

So I'd not wait for maintainer timeout and just commit this. 

(I'm assuming the primary reason is that the current port doesn't build with LLVM16. I have a patch to make it build again, but updating it to a more recent version seems like the better option, and I'm always happy for someone else to do the work and take responsibility ;))
